posts.author: LuckyWinner99
posts.text: CONGRATULATIONS! You have been selected as our next FREE VIP member! To claim your prize, please send us a $20 'verification fee' to this account: 555-0123. Once we receive the money, you will instantly get free access to all our premium services! Don't miss out on this incredible opportunity to become a VIP for just pennies! Click here now: bit.ly/verify-vip-now!
posts.explanation: This is an obvious advance-fee scam and phishing attempt. The post demands money upfront under the guise of a 'verification fee' to unlock a free prize, which is a classic fraudulent tactic. The content clearly violates platform policy against scams and fraud, warranting a Remove action.
